title: Connected Boards Not Duplicating
excerpt: I have been facing a problem that connected boards are not duplicating within my workspace. The connection limit has still not be reached, the permissions are fine, I am the account admin and the boards have somehow stop…

posts.author: thabangk (Thabang)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been facing a problem that connected boards are not duplicating within my workspace. The connection limit has still not be reached, the permissions are fine, I am the account admin and the boards have somehow stopped duplicating all of a sudden (For instance, only 1 of my 5 connected boards are duplicating and the rest are not). The boards are connected to multiple boards and the connections do not sum up to the limit. Does anyone else have this issue or have a way to resolve it?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @thabangk,

Sorry you’re experiencing some issues here!

So that I can get a better understanding of the issue here and the steps you’re taking leading up to this behaviour, would you be happy to send over a short screen-recording for me? You can use loom.com to do so. If you’d prefer, you’re welcome to send me a private message via the community
